subject: fix(branch): comprehensive cleanup and hardening across auto-tagging branch
body:
Pattern matching:
- Fix false-positive bug: amountClose alone could match unrelated
  transactions (e.g. "Car purchase" matching "Rent" by amount).
  Now requires description match — amount is supplementary, not standalone.

useTagSuggestions:
- Replace unbounded timeouts array with Set-based tracking that
  self-prunes on fire/cancel — no more stale ID accumulation
- Split pending map into pendingSingle/pendingBatch with proper
  types — eliminates unsafe union casts through resolve callbacks
- Worker error handler clears timeouts on pending entries

TransactionEditModal:
- Add for/id associations on all label-input pairs (a11y)
- Add ARIA combobox role + listbox/option on autocomplete dropdown
- Debounce autocomplete DB query (100ms) to avoid per-keystroke reads
- Add date validation (required, YYYY-MM-DD format)
- Replace ref-based blur timer with plain let (simpler cleanup)

TransactionTable:
- Guard malformed date strings in formatDate (fallback to raw string)

NewImportWizard:
- Remove dead importedCount ref (written but never read)
- Clear error message on forward step transition (step 2→3)

debugLog:
- Fix misleading "circular buffer" comment (it's a capped array)

Tags: ml, a11y, ux, bugfix, cleanup
Complexity: 3
Urgency: 3
Impact: user-facing
Risk: medium
Debt: paid
Epic: auto-tagging
Semver: patch
